<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\Search; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/ft.info/ * * Return information and statistics on the index. */ class FTINFO extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'FT.INFO'; } }
